spec.name: Spell That Blocks
spec.summary: A spell that blocks effects using electric magic.
spec.effect_description: A spell that blocks effects using electric magic. A pentagon filter/create recipe that channels electric discipline into shock output. It applies a sphere pattern against where written across anchored reach with immediate persistence.
